testcase.name: test_node_and_stream_info_error_paths
testcase.failure: tests\unit\data\integration\test_enhanced_integration_manager_edges.py:490: in test_node_and_stream_info_error_paths monkeypatch.setattr(original_lock, "acquire", mock_lock_acquire) E AttributeError: '_thread.RLock' object attribute 'acquire' is read-only

testcase.name: test_node_and_stream_info_error_paths

error.message: failed on teardown with "AttributeError: '_thread.RLock' object attribute 'acquire' is read-only"

testcase.error: C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:344: in from_call result: TResult | None = func() C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:246: in <lambda> lambda: runtest_hook(item=item, **kwds), when=when, reraise=reraise C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\pluggy\_hooks.py:512: in __call__ return self._hookexec(self.name, self._hookimpls.copy(), kwargs, firstresult) C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\pluggy\_manager.py:120: in _hookexec return self._inner_hookexec(hook_name, methods, kwargs, firstresult) C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\logging.py:858: in pytest_runtest_teardown yield C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\capture.py:905: in pytest_runtest_teardown return (yield) C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:193: in pytest_runtest_teardown item.session._setupstate.teardown_exact(nextitem) C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:557: in teardown_exact raise exceptions[0] C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:546: in teardown_exact fin() C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:1068: in finish raise exceptions[0] C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:1057: in finish fin() C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:938: in _teardown_yield_fixture next(it) C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\monkeypatch.py:57: in monkeypatch mpatch.undo() C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\lib\site-packages\_pytest\monkeypatch.py:394: in undo setattr(obj, name, value) E AttributeError: '_thread.RLock' object attribute 'acquire' is read-only
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: enhanced_cache INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:500 增强版数据集成管理器初始化完成 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:153 注册节点: node1 (localhost:8080) INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:555 创建数据流: info_test_1763312543 --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
